scripts.lint: oxfmt --check app src build-package.ts next-env.d.ts next.config.ts package.json tsconfig.json dist/package.json && oxlint app src build-package.ts next-env.d.ts next.config.ts
scripts.fix: oxfmt --write app src build-package.ts next-env.d.ts next.config.ts package.json tsconfig.json dist/package.json && oxlint --fix app src build-package.ts next-env.d.ts next.config.ts
